channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: Supercharge your AI agents: The New ADK Integrations Ecosystem
item.description: The Agent Development Kit (ADK) now integrates with various third-party tools like GitHub and Notion, enhancing the capabilities of AI agents for real-world applications.

item.title: How we built the Google I/O 2026 Save the Date experience
item.description: Google I/O 2026 will take place on May 19-20, featuring a save the date puzzle that showcases AI's potential in enhancing event experiences.

item.title: You can't stream the energy: A developer's guide to Google Cloud Next '26 in Vegas
item.description: Google Cloud Next '26 in Las Vegas will focus on networking and hands-on problem solving, emphasizing the transition to agentic AI with specialized technical tracks.

item.title: What's new in TensorFlow 2.21
item.description: Google has launched LiteRT, the successor to TFLite, which enhances GPU and NPU acceleration and supports PyTorch and JAX for improved AI deployment.

item.title: Introducing Wednesday Build Hour
item.description: Wednesday Build Hour is a new interactive session by Google Cloud aimed at helping developers enhance their cloud skills through hands-on building.

item.title: Unleash Your Development Superpowers: Refining the Core Coding Experience
item.description: The Gemini Code Assist team has introduced updates to streamline coding workflows, enhancing the AI's ability to collaborate with developers.

item.title: Introducing Finish Changes and Outlines, now available in Gemini Code Assist extensions on IntelliJ and VS Code
item.description: New features in Gemini Code Assist for IntelliJ and VS Code aim to reduce developer friction by automating code completion and providing high-level summaries.

item.title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
item.description: OpenAI has introduced a $100/month Pro plan for ChatGPT, responding to user demand for a more affordable subscription option.

item.title: I tried CuerdOS and this niche Debian distro is dramatically fast
item.description: CuerdOS is a fast Debian-based Linux distribution that offers a unique approach to preinstalled software, making it stand out in the market.

item.title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
item.description: Florida's Attorney General is investigating OpenAI after ChatGPT was allegedly used to plan a shooting, raising concerns about AI's role in violent incidents.

item.title: “Negative” views of Broadcom driving thousands of VMware migrations, rival says
item.description: A Western Union executive reported that negative perceptions of Broadcom are prompting many companies to migrate from VMware. This shift highlights the challenges in partnerships with Broadcom.

item.title: After data breach, $10B-valued startup Mercor is having a month
item.description: Mercor, a startup valued at $10 billion, is facing lawsuits and losing customers after a data breach. This incident raises concerns about cybersecurity in high-value companies.

item.title: Ask Copilot in security assessments now available
item.description: GitHub has introduced a feature allowing organization admins to use Copilot directly from security assessment results for contextual guidance. This aims to enhance security management.

item.title: Anthropic will let your agents sleep on its couch
item.description: Anthropic has launched Managed Agents, a service designed to automate ongoing business tasks using AI. This could significantly change how businesses operate.

item.title: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
item.description: Meta's AI app has surged to No. 5 on the App Store following the launch of its Muse Spark model, up from No. 57. This indicates strong user interest and engagement.

item.title: Google wants more Intel inside ... its datacenters, taps Chipzilla for more SmartNICs
item.description: Google is expanding its partnership with Intel by purchasing more SmartNICs for its datacenters, opting for Intel's solutions over developing its own. This move reflects a strategic collaboration.

item.title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
item.description: Anthropic has limited the release of its new model, Mythos, citing concerns over its ability to identify security vulnerabilities. This raises questions about the balance between innovation and safety.

item.title: Google and Intel deepen AI infrastructure partnership
item.description: Google and Intel are deepening their partnership to co-develop custom chips amid a global CPU shortage. This collaboration aims to meet the increasing demand for AI infrastructure.

item.title: Home Depot will give you a free power tool with this DeWalt deal - what to know
item.description: Home Depot is offering a promotion where customers can receive a free power tool with the purchase of a DeWalt bundle. This deal aims to boost sales during the lawn care season.

item.title: Crypto? Huh. Good gawd y'all, what is it good for? $45M in this case
item.description: Law enforcement agencies disrupted a $45 million global cryptocurrency scam, recovering $12 million in stolen funds. This highlights ongoing issues with cryptocurrency fraud.

item.title: Samsung S95H vs. Samsung S95F: I compared both OLED TVs, and there's a surprise winner
item.description: A comparison between Samsung's S95H and S95F OLED TVs reveals that the newer model has surprising advantages, prompting consumers to reconsider their purchasing decisions. The review highlights key differences that could influence buyers looking for the best display technology.

item.title: New Low Quality option in the Hide comment menu
item.description: GitHub introduces a Low Quality option for moderators to classify hidden comments, enhancing comment management across various platforms like issues and pull requests. This feature aims to improve the quality of discussions by allowing better categorization of comments.

item.title: Understanding Amazon Bedrock model lifecycle
item.description: Amazon Bedrock's model lifecycle management is explained, detailing how to handle transitions between models to ensure AI applications remain functional. The post outlines strategies for planning migrations and utilizing new features for seamless updates.

item.title: The future of managing agents at scale: AWS Agent Registry now in preview
item.description: AWS announces the preview of its Agent Registry, a centralized platform for discovering and sharing AI agents and tools within enterprises. This aims to streamline the management of AI agents at scale, enhancing organizational efficiency.

item.title: New Sort by control added to Notifications
item.description: GitHub adds a new 'Sort by' control to the Notifications page, allowing users to organize notifications from newest to oldest or vice versa. This feature enhances user experience by providing more control over notification management.

item.title: How I turned my Android tablet into the ultimate Kindle alternative - for free
item.description: An article discusses how to transform an Android tablet into a Kindle alternative, allowing users to access their entire reading library without needing a separate device. This approach highlights the versatility of tablets for reading.

item.title: Repository member role labels now in pull request list view
item.description: GitHub now displays repository member role labels in the pull request list view, making it easier to identify contributors' roles directly. This update aims to enhance collaboration and recognition within projects.

item.title: Embed a live AI browser agent in your React app with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
item.description: A guide on embedding a live AI browser agent in a React app using Amazon Bedrock's AgentCore is provided, detailing the steps to create an interactive experience for users. This showcases the integration of AI within web applications.

item.title: Apple's iOS 26.4.1 update enables Stolen Device Protection by default now - grab it today
item.description: Apple's iOS 26.4.1 update introduces Stolen Device Protection by default and fixes an iCloud syncing issue, along with general bug fixes. This update enhances device security and user experience.

item.title: I use ChatGPT's new Tubi app to find free movies and TV shows to watch - here's how
item.description: The Tubi TV streaming service now integrates with ChatGPT, allowing users to search for free movies and TV shows using AI. This feature enhances user interaction and simplifies content discovery.

item.title: Why Ubuntu 26.04 will thrill gamers - and it's not just the performance bump
item.description: Ubuntu 26.04 enhances gaming with improved speed and new apps, while also omitting some features that may excite gamers. This release is significant for its focus on performance and user experience.

item.title: Release information in issue sidebar and default values for project fields
item.description: GitHub's latest update introduces release tracking in issue sidebars and customizable defaults for project fields, improving navigation and project management. This enhancement helps streamline workflows for developers.

item.title: Escaping the Fork: How Meta Modernized WebRTC Across 50+ Use Cases
item.description: Meta has modernized WebRTC to support over 50 use cases, addressing challenges of maintaining an internal fork. This modernization ensures better integration and community engagement.

item.title: Introducing stateful MCP client capabilities on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime
item.description: Amazon Bedrock's new MCP client capabilities allow for stateful servers that can interact with users and generate dynamic content. This feature enhances the functionality of applications built on the platform.

item.title: Strength and Destiny Collide: ‘Samson: A Tyndalston Story’ Arrives in the Cloud
item.description: The game 'Samson: A Tyndalston Story' is now available on GeForce NOW, allowing players to stream it on various devices. This release highlights the growing trend of cloud gaming.

item.title: National Robotics Week — Latest Physical AI Research, Breakthroughs and Resources
item.description: During National Robotics Week, NVIDIA showcases advancements in physical AI, emphasizing robots' roles in various industries. This highlights the rapid evolution of robotics and AI integration.

item.title: GitHub availability report: March 2026
item.description: GitHub's availability report for March 2026 details four incidents that caused performance issues. This report is crucial for users to understand service reliability.

item.title: CyberAgent moves faster with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
item.description: CyberAgent is leveraging ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to enhance AI adoption and decision-making in its operations. This integration aims to improve quality across various sectors.

item.title: OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest: Terms & Conditions
item.description: OpenAI has launched the Full Fan Mode Contest, inviting participants to submit entries for a chance to win IPL match tickets. This initiative aims to engage the community.

item.title: A Theoretical Framework for Acoustic Neighbor Embeddings
item.description: This paper presents a theoretical framework for understanding acoustic neighbor embeddings, offering insights into phonetic similarities in audio and text. It aims to enhance the application of these embeddings.

item.title: LaCy: What Small Language Models Can and Should Learn is Not Just a Question of Loss
item.description: The paper discusses the limitations of Small Language Models (SLMs) in retaining factual knowledge due to their parameter size, suggesting that access to larger models can help mitigate inaccuracies. This research highlights the need for improved methods in training SLMs for better performance.

item.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
item.description: Waypoint-1.5 introduces higher-fidelity interactive worlds designed for everyday GPUs, enhancing the user experience in virtual environments. This development aims to make advanced interactive simulations more accessible to a broader audience.

item.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
item.description: This article explores the use of multimodal embedding and reranker models with Sentence Transformers, focusing on their applications in improving search and retrieval tasks. The insights provided could lead to more effective AI-driven solutions in various domains.

item.title: Copilot-reviewed pull request merge metrics now in the usage metrics API
item.description: GitHub's Copilot usage metrics API has been updated to include metrics for pull requests reviewed by Copilot, building on previous metrics for throughput and cycle time. This enhancement provides developers with better insights into the effectiveness of AI-assisted coding.

item.title: nvidia-nat-llama-index 1.6.0rc1
item.description: The release of nvidia-nat-llama-index 1.6.0rc1 introduces a subpackage for integrating Llama-Index into the NeMo Agent Toolkit, enhancing the toolkit's capabilities for AI applications. This update is significant for developers working with NVIDIA's AI tools.

item.title: nteract 2.1.4a202604082223
item.description: Nteract 2.1.4a202604082223 brings AI capabilities to Jupyter notebooks, allowing integration with various AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT. This update enhances the interactive data analysis experience for users.

item.title: nvidia-nat-langchain 1.6.0rc1
item.description: The nvidia-nat-langchain 1.6.0rc1 release provides a subpackage for LangChain/LangGraph integration within the NeMo Agent Toolkit, further enhancing its utility for AI developers. This update is aimed at improving AI model deployment.

item.title: [OpenSearch Service] ML Commons(AI Connectors) を Workflow API で構築して、Slackメッセージのハイブリッド検索を作成してみました
item.description: An article discusses the creation of a hybrid search for Slack messages using the OpenSearch Service and ML Commons via Workflow API. This development aims to improve information retrieval within Slack, enhancing team collaboration.

item.title: Patreon podcast revenue jumps 33% year-over-year, reaching $629 million
item.description: Patreon reports a 33% year-over-year increase in podcast revenue, reaching $629 million in 2025, highlighting the platform's growing importance for content creators. This surge reflects the ongoing popularity and monetization potential of podcasts.

item.title: tend 0.0.7
item.description: The release of tend 0.0.7 introduces Claude-powered continuous integration (CI) for GitHub repositories, streamlining the development process. This tool aims to enhance productivity for developers using GitHub.
